text:
Patient ID CHAR 36
NPI Provider's National Provider Identifier CHAR 10
VISIT_DATE Patient Visit Date DATE 8
FOLLOWUP_ATTESTATION Practitioner's Attestation to Follow-up CHAR 1
ACCURACY_ATTESTATION Practitioner's Accuracy of Attestation CHAR 1
RISK_SCORE Calculated ASCVD Risk Score CHAR 10
BASELINE_SCORE Patient's Baseline ASCVD Score CHAR 10
BASELINE_GROUP Patient's Baseline Group (Low, Medium, High) CHAR 10
BASELINE_DATE Patient's Baseline Date DATE 8
CREATE_DATE Date the Record was Created
